I found your dental appointment in the calendar:

- Title: Dentist Appointment
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Event ID: 5
- Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com
- Status: confirmed

How would you like me to reschedule it? Please tell me one of the following:

1. Exact new date and time (e.g., “May 22 at 10:00–11:00”).
2. A date range or preferences and I’ll propose free slots from your calendar (e.g., “Any morning next week” or “Between May 20–24, afternoons only”).
3. Move it to the next available day/time at roughly the same time (I can search your calendar for the nearest free 1-hour slot).

Also confirm:
- Keep the same duration (1 hour)? (yes/no)
- Keep the same location/clinic? (yes/no)
- Notify participants (automatically sends update email)? (default: yes)

Tell me which option you want and any constraints, and I’ll reschedule it.
